item.title: Dent seeks to make temporary early wildfire air support program permanent

item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 19-23, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: 👍Noel Hardin - Asotin County Fire District 1
item.description: Noel Hardin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Asotin County Fire District 1.

item.title: 👍George Geissler - Department of Natural Resources
item.description: George Geissler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Natural Resources.

item.title: 👍ROBERT BELL - HUNTIN WITH BOB
item.description: ROBERT BELL signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent HUNTIN WITH BOB.
